data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for weekly/monthly overtime tracking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to track overtime on a weekly/monthly basis. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for tracking overtime, but there is no direct evidence demonstrating that this requirement is implemented or validated, leading to a blockage in coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the ability to track weekly/monthly overtime.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the weekly/monthly overtime tracking requirement.
